examples.title: Algorithm: Region Growing
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating the Region Growing algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM RegionGrowing
INPUT: Image, Seed Points, Similarity Criterion
OUTPUT: Segmented Regions

BEGIN
  FOR EACH seed point
    Initialize region with seed point
    WHILE new pixels can be added
      FOR EACH neighboring pixel
        IF pixel satisfies similarity criterion
          Add pixel to region
      END FOR
    END WHILE
  END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the Region Growing algorithm, which starts with seed points and iteratively adds neighboring pixels that satisfy a predefined similarity criterion.

examples.title: Python: Region Growing
examples.description: Python implementation of the Region Growing algorithm
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates the Region Growing algorithm using a simple similarity criterion based on pixel intensity.

examples.title: C: Region Splitting and Merging
examples.description: C implementation of the Region Splitting and Merging algorithm
examples.explanation: This C implementation demonstrates the Region Splitting and Merging algorithm by splitting a region into four quadrants and assigning pixels to each quadrant.
